column1: # Copy this file beside UmaViewer.exe as UmaPetForge_Overrides.csv.
# Keep comments only to retain the automatic default motions.
# Use exactly three unquoted fields; commas inside values are not supported.
# Use * for a compatible general motion applied to every selected character.
# Exact character rows override a matching * row.
# Use auto on an exact character row to opt that character out of a wildcard.
# Slow Windows idle experiment: enable one general loop
# and compare it with automatic before choosing a project default.
